scripts.electron:dev: concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron -r ts-node/register electron/main.ts"
scripts.electron:build: cross-env BUILD_TARGET=electron next build && tsc electron/main.ts electron/preload.ts --target es2020 --module commonjs --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck && electron-builder build --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.electron:build:win: cross-env BUILD_TARGET=electron next build && tsc electron/main.ts electron/preload.ts --target es2020 --module commonjs --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck && electron-builder build --win --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.electron:build:mac: cross-env BUILD_TARGET=electron next build && tsc electron/main.ts electron/preload.ts --target es2020 --module commonjs --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck && electron-builder build --mac --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.electron:build:linux: cross-env BUILD_TARGET=electron next build && tsc electron/main.ts electron/preload.ts --target es2020 --module commonjs --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck && electron-builder build --linux --config electron-builder.yml
